metadata.description: Example UI extensions distributed via an OpenHands marketplace.

uiExtensions.name: hello-sidebar
uiExtensions.description: Adds a Hello panel to the activity bar.

uiExtensions.name: hello-npm
uiExtensions.description: Versioned: published to npm, loaded via jsDelivr at a pinned version.

uiExtensions.name: hello-gh-monorepo
uiExtensions.description: Versioned: a GitHub repo at a tag; 'path' selects one extension in a monorepo.
